fpm_normalize.approach: Normalize the 48-bit product by checking bit 47; if set, right-shift fraction and increment exponent; extract bits 46-24 (or 47-25 if shifted) as normalized fraction; guard is bit 23, sticky is OR of bits 22-0.

Normalize by checking bit 47 of the 48-bit product; if clear, extract bits [46:24] as fraction with bit 23 as guard and OR of bits [22:0] as sticky; if set, right-shift to extract bits [47:25] as fraction with bit 24 as guard, increment exponent, and OR bits [23:0] as sticky.

Normalize 48-bit product by checking bit 47; if set, right-shift to extract bits [47:25] as fraction with bit 24 as guard and OR of bits [23:0] as sticky, incrementing exponent; if clear, extract bits [46:24] as fraction with bit 23 as guard and OR of bits [22:0] as sticky.
